title: felicia hyssopifolia subsp. hyssopifolia
intro: Felicia hyssopifolia subsp. hyssopifolia, also known as blue felicia or blue daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits, which include antioxidant and expectorant properties. Felicia hyssopifolia subsp. hyssopifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
